name: Raisin Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Stir in margarine and raisins, and continue boiling uncovered for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let the mixture cool until lukewarm.
3. Add sugar substitute gradually while stirring. Dissolve baking soda in 1/4 cup warm water; stir into the raisin mixture thoroughly.
4. Mix eggs separately and add to the batter.
5. Gradually combine flour, ground cloves, allspice, and cinnamon with the raisin mixture, stirring after each addition.
6. Add eggs to the batter and pour it into a 10-inch Bundt pan coated with vegetable cooking spray.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes to 1 hour or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the bundt pan for 10 minutes before removing it. Serve on a wire rack.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 1/2 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 170; CHO: 22mg; CAR: 24gm; PRO: 3gm; SOD: 222mg
